achievements.title: YAL International Flight 82, You Are In The Clear
achievements.description: Disarmed all bombs and protected the Airliner in the Special Mission (Area 88 Romset only) ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: I'm Coming Home, Ryoko...
achievements.description: Completed the entire game using Shin Kazama ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: The Long and Painful War is Finally Over
achievements.description: Completed the entire game using Mickey Simon ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Send Me Back In, I'm Not Done With Them Yet!
achievements.description: Completed the entire game using Greg Gates ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Buzzing the Leaderboard Tower
achievements.description: Get 100k Points or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Turning and Burning Up the Leaderboard
achievements.description: Get 250k Points or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Hitting the Score Afterburners
achievements.description: Get 500k Points or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Taking the Score to the Danger Zone
achievements.description: Get 1 Million Points or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: The Price of Freedom (in Points)
achievements.description: Get 1.5 Million Points or more.  Does Saki also accept Points as well as Dollars for the Cancellation fee? ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: McCoy has great deals for that 100k!
achievements.description: Get 100k Dollars or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: McCoy's Frequent Flyer Buyer
achievements.description: Get 200k Dollars or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: McCoy's Best Customer
achievements.description: Get 300k Dollars or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: McCoy's wondering if you'll spend any of that money...
achievements.description: Get 400k Dollars or more ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: No. Let's Not Go To Candy Mountain.
achievements.description: Destroy all the destructible trees and collect the hidden Unicorn in Mission 3 ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Mobi-Chan Stranded in the Desert
achievements.description: Scour the sands with your Vulcan and Collect the hidden Mobi-Chan in Mission 4 ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Mobi-Chan's Electrifying Gift
achievements.description: Smash all the Rock Pillars and Collect the hidden Mobi-Chan in Mission 5 ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Mobi-Chan Mining For Points
achievements.description: Dig up and Collect the hidden Mobi-Chan in Mission 6 ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Mobi-Chan Out For A Swim
achievements.description: Aim for the Skies and Collect this hidden Mobi-Chan in Mission 8.  Mobi-Chan's a good swimmer! ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Mobi-Chan Surfing Clouds in Style
achievements.description: Find and Collect the hidden Mobi-Chan riding along the clouds in the Special Mission (Area 88 romset only) ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir

achievements.title: Guns! Full Power!
achievements.description: Max out your Vulcan Level at Lv. 7 ('Normal' Difficulty or higher)
achievements.author: rauvoir
